    sysutils/mkdesktop: Update to version 5.0

    Since FreeBSD 13 has dropped support for hal, mkdesktop needed a couple
    of corresponding changes.

    PR:             255252
    Approved by:    Manish Jain <bourne.identity@hotmail.com> (maintainer)
